en: Hello father, let's get you some place warm, yeah, yeah, remember me?
ko: 안녕하세요 아버지, 따뜻한 곳으로 가요, 네, 저를 기억하시죠?

en: Excuse me sir, are you the one who brought the old man in?
ko: 실례합니다, 당신이 그 노인을 데려온 분인가요?

en: He was just old, it was just his time.
ko: 그냥 나이가 많아서, 때가 된 거죠.

en: I want to see his chart, excuse me.
Sir, sir, you can't come in here.
Sir, this is a restricted area.
